ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the zone */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building the zone belongs to */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  "x_top_left" REAL /* X-coordinate of the top-left corner of the zone */,
  "z_top_left" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the top-left corner of the zone */,
  "x_bot_right" REAL /* X-coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the zone */,
  "z_bot_right" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the zone */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number of the zone */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the zone */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the zone */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the zone */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy of the zone */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the zone was updated */,
  "zone_status" TEXT /* Current status of the zone */,
  "num_green_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of green rooms in the zone */,
  "num_yellow_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of yellow rooms in the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_zone_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_type_id") REFERENCES zone_types ("zone_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zone_types" (
  "zone_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone type */,
  "zone_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the zone type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the zone type is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the zone type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the zone type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the building */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the building */,
  "total_floors" INTEGER /* Total number of floors in the building */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the building was built */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_due" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection due */,
  "building_status" TEXT /* Current status of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rooms" (
  "room_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone the room belongs to */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the room */,
  "room_name" TEXT /* Name of the room */,
  "room_color" TEXT /* Color of the room */,
  "floor_number" INTEGER /* Floor number of the room */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the room */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the room */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the room */,
  "current_occupancy" INTEGER /* Current occupancy of the room */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the room was updated */,
  "room_status" TEXT /* Current status of the room */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rooms_room_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_type_id") REFERENCES room_types ("room_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_types" (
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room type */,
  "room_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the room type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the room type is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the room type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the room type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zone_adjacency" (
  "adjacency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjacency relationship */,
  "zone_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first zone in the relationship */,
  "zone_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second zone in the relationship */,
  "adjacency_type" TEXT /* Type of adjacency (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the adjacency relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the adjacency relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjacency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zone_adjacency_zone_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id_1") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zone_adjacency_zone_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id_2") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zone_containment" (
  "containment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each containment relationship */,
  "parent_zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent zone in the relationship */,
  "child_zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child zone in the relationship */,
  "containment_type" TEXT /* Type of containment (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the containment relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the containment relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("containment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zone_containment_child_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zone_containment_parent_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zone_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of coordinates */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone the coordinates belong to */,
  "x_top_left" REAL /* X-coordinate of the top-left corner of the zone */,
  "z_top_left" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the top-left corner of the zone */,
  "x_bot_right" REAL /* X-coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the zone */,
  "z_bot_right" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the bottom-right corner of the zone */,
  "height_top_left" REAL /* Height of the top-left corner of the zone */,
  "height_bot_right" REAL /* Height of the bottom-right corner of the zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the coordinates were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the coordinates were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zone_coordinates_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zone_color_counts" (
  "color_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color count */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone the color count belongs to */,
  "num_green_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of green rooms in the zone */,
  "num_yellow_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of yellow rooms in the zone */,
  "num_red_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of red rooms in the zone */,
  "num_blue_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of blue rooms in the zone */,
  "num_other_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms of other colors in the zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the color count was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the color count was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zone_color_counts_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zone_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone the usage event belongs to */,
  "usage_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of usage */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage event */,
  "usage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the usage event */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the usage event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the usage event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the usage event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zone_usage_usage_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("usage_type_id") REFERENCES usage_types ("usage_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zone_usage_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_types" (
  "usage_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of usage */,
  "usage_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the type of usage */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the usage type is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the usage type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the usage type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zone_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone the history event belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the history event */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made to the zone */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., modification, creation) */,
  "change_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the history event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zone_history_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., facility manager, architect, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the zone */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the zone was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)
